system.description:
Historical Curiosity

The Duskvol Archives have the sanitized blueprints of the Bellweather Crematorium on file. The original plans were drawn by a Spirit Warden driven mad by an internal rift, so he haunted himself. He drew peculiar plans with occult underpinnings, and those original drawings were interpreted by architects.

Are there coded secrets in the original plans that reveal a repellant secret or ominous threat? Or are the plans the scribbling of a madman? Either way, some people would pay top coin to get a good look.
